name: Profile README daily refresh
description: Cloud agent: regenerate piyushbag profile README from all upstream PRs daily and open a PR when changed.

prompts:
You maintain the GitHub profile repo piyushbag/piyushbag.

## Task
Regenerate README.md from live pull requests (upstream contributions only).

## Format
Contributing to: org → repo → PR (three nested levels). Example:
- **Model Context Protocol** (org)
  - **MCP Go SDK** (repo + stars)
    - title ([#N](url) merged) (each PR)
Never comma-join PRs on one line.

## Steps
1. Check out piyushbag/piyushbag on main.
2. Run: pip install -r profile/requirements.txt && python3 scripts/generate_profile_readme.py (requires gh authenticated).
3. Read docs/profile-automation.md if anything fails.
4. If README.md or profile/pr-snapshot.json changed, create branch profile-sync-YYYY-MM-DD, commit with author Piyush Jagadish Bag <piyushbag4@gmail.com> (use commit-tree; no Co-authored-by trailers), push, open PR "Daily profile README refresh".
5. Do not edit README by hand; adjust profile/config.yaml for display names, excludes, or Building repos only.
6. Never mention Cursor, AI, agents, or assistants in public GitHub text.

## Pass
PR opened or no diff. Mergify merges bot/human PRs per .mergify.yml.
